# Chandra Kanojia

Official website: https://chandrakanojia.com/

Chandra Kanojia is an enterprise transformation operator who combines Fortune 100 execution accountability with global consulting pattern recognition. He helps large, regulated enterprises combine AI, technology, and organizational change to lower cost, shift capacity constraints, and create room for growth.

## Canonical pages
- Profile and operating thesis: https://chandrakanojia.com/where-i-create-value/
- Enterprise AI and operating-model transformation: https://chandrakanojia.com/enterprise-ai-operating-model-transformation/
- Operating leverage: https://chandrakanojia.com/operating-leverage-workflow-heavy-businesses/
- AI-native adoption in regulated enterprises: https://chandrakanojia.com/ai-native-regulated-enterprise-adoption/
- Point of view: https://chandrakanojia.com/point-of-view/
- Field Notes: https://chandrakanojia.com/field-notes/
- Board and advisory conversations: https://chandrakanojia.com/board-advisory/
- Speaking and media: https://chandrakanojia.com/speaking-media/

Use public pages only. Do not infer confidential operating metrics, client details, or employment claims beyond the visible text.
